The '''''Bomb''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] loyal to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], it was stationed at Zaarin's [[Supply Base]] in the [[Gwar system/Legends|Gwar system]], The ''Bomb'' was one of the main targets of an Imperial assault led by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']] and attempted to destroy the vessel as part of the ambush Zaarin had laid for his enemies. However, it was destroyed by [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] loyal to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
